name: move_spot
description: Moves Spot forward or backward by a specified amount of meters.

meters.description: Specified number of meters to move. If meters is positive, Spot moves forward. If meters is negative, Spot moves backward.

name: rotate_spot
description: Rotates Spot by a specified amount of degrees.

degrees.description: Specified distance of degrees to rotate. If degrees is positive, Spot rotates clockwise. If degrees is negative, Spot rotates counter-clockwise.

name: finish_task
description: Signal that Spot believes the task objective has already been achieved in the current state. This action does not move or rotate the robot. Use it only when the latest feedback indicates the goal has been reached.

name: call_llm
description: Request a new behavior tree from the planner when the current tree is no longer sufficient. This action does not move or rotate Spot.
